title: Helixanthera somalensis
taxonomy: Helixanthera somalensis is a species of mistletoe in the family Loranthaceae. This plant is a type of parasitic flowering plant that grows on the branches of its host trees. Loranthaceae is a family of flowering plants commonly known as mistletoe, and Helixanthera somalensis is one of the species within this family. Helixanthera somalensis is native to Somalia and is a part of the larger Helixanthera genus. The classification of Helixanthera somalensis can also be further broken down into its kingdom (Plantae), division (Angiospermophyta), and order (Santalales).
